mapper.sql: c.is_delete = 0 AND c.is_active = 1 AND c.content_status IN ('STATUS_SCHEDULED','STATUS_OPEN','STATUS_CLOSED')
mapper.select:
SELECT c.content_id AS contentId, c.title AS title, c.main_image_path AS main_image_path, c.category AS category, c.content_kind AS content_kind, c.location AS location, c.start_at AS start_at, c.end_at AS end_at
, COALESCE(pl.like_cnt, 0) AS like_cnt
, CASE WHEN #{dto.q} IS NULL OR #{dto.q} = '' THEN 0 WHEN c.title = #{dto.q} THEN 100 WHEN c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.q}, '%') THEN 70 WHEN c.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.q}, '%') THEN 40 WHEN c.location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.q}, '%') THEN 20 ELSE 0 END AS relevance_score
FROM content c
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cl.content_id, COUNT(*) AS like_cnt FROM content_like cl GROUP BY cl.content_id ) pl ON pl.content_id = c.content_id
AND c.content_status != 'STATUS_CLOSED'
AND c.adult_price = 0
AND ( c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.q}, '%') OR c.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.q}, '%') OR c.location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.q}, '%') )
AND c.content_kind = #{dto.content_kind}
AND c.category IN
#{cat}
AND c.place_tag IN
#{pt}
AND c.reservation_type = #{dto.reservation_type}
AND c.start_at >= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{dto.start_at}, ' 00:00:00'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND c.end_at <= STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{dto.end_at}, ' 23:59:59'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
ORDER BY COALESCE(pl.like_cnt, 0) DESC, c.start_at DESC
ORDER BY c.start_at DESC
ORDER BY relevance_score DESC, c.start_at DESC
ORDER BY c.start_at DESC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
